reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Approved the patch with Acked-by. The code looks good and aligns with existing memory hotplug operations.

2026-06-05.patch_summary: The patch introduces a new helper function, memory_block_aligned_range(), which aligns physical address ranges to memory block boundaries for hotplug operations. This is achieved by updating the start address up and end address down to the nearest memory block boundary. The helper is added to <linux/memory.h> and used in dax/kmem.c.
